channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Notre top des meilleurs PC portables en 2026 : ultraportables, gaming et rapport qualité/prix
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un nouvel ordinateur portable ? Entre les MacBook, Zenbook, Dell XPS, Galaxy Book… il y a de quoi faire. Nous avons testé et comparé de nombreux modèles pour vous aider à trouver le meilleur PC portable, selon vos critères et budget.

item.title: Your Home Could Soon Be Uninsurable If You’re in One of These States
item.description: Home insurance is buckling under climate risk and construction trends. Find out how your state fares.

item.title: Il aspire, démêle et lave : ce Dyson V12s Detect Submarine perd plus de 200 € pour nettoyer vos intérieurs de fond en comble
item.description: Le Dyson V12s Detect Submarine propose une bonne puissance d'aspiration et permet non seulement d'aspirer mais aussi de laver. Son prix passe de 719 euros à 499 euros sur le site officiel.

item.title: Microsoft fixes nasty Windows 11 bug that breaks Edge, OneDrive, and other apps, but you won't get it automatically — here's what you need to do
item.description: Frustrated by that bug that breaks Edge, OneDrive, and other apps in Windows 11? There's a fix — and this is how you get it.

item.title: Wheely, an on-demand chauffeur app, makes its US debut in NYC
item.description: When the Uber Black isn't premium enough, New Yorkers now have the option to call for a Wheely instead. Whimsical name aside, the London-based company is breaking into the US market by offering its chauffeur-hailing services to residents of New York City first, as first reported by Bloomberg. Think of it like Uber, but for business executives and VIPs who prefer better service and riding in Cadillacs and Mercedes. "New York has long been requested by our customers, whether that be New Yorkers who have traveled with us in Europe and the Middle East, or our international clients who regularly vi...

item.title: 'Some of my least favorite headphones to test': I used the Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 for a month, and one issue makes them very hard to recommend
item.description: Samsung's mid-ranged earbuds aim to offer an alternative affordable option to the brand's top-priced Buds, but they're not a worthy substitute.

item.title: iPhone Fold : l’écran serait pris en sandwich entre deux couches de verre pour éviter les plis
item.description: Apple envisagerait un système où l'écran de l'iPhone Fold prendrait place entre deux panneaux de verre ultra-fin. Une manière de mieux contrôler la pliure.

item.title: "It would be better to have a framework": Watchdog says UK government's £1.5 billion bailout to Jaguar Land Rover after cyberattack leaves big questions to be answered
item.description: For some, the bailout is an unfortunate precedent as other similar victims might ask for help as well.

item.title: OnlyFans Owner Dies of Cancer at 43
item.description: The billionaire entrepreneur Leonid Radvinsky led the company through its meteoric rise in the porn industry.

item.title: Crimson Desert : il y a des éléments créés par IA dans le jeu, les développeurs s’excusent
item.description: Des joueurs ont repéré des éléments générés par l'intelligence artificielle dans Crimson Desert. Ce n'était pas intentionnel d'après le studio.

item.title: Federal immigration agents filmed making airport arrests as Trump calls in ICE to ease security line delays
item.description: The Trump administration has deployed ICE agents to over a dozen U.S. airports amid an ongoing federal shutdown that's causing long wait times. Eyewitnesses have already recorded at least one arrest in San Francisco's airport.

item.title: Smart TV et assistants vocaux : la guerre des écrans se joue à Bruxelles
item.description: Plusieurs grands groupes audiovisuels, dont Canal+, TF1, RTL ou encore Disney, ont demandé à la Commission européenne de considérer les systèmes d'exploitation des box de streaming et des téléviseurs connectés comme des contrôleurs d'accès en vertu du DMA. Android TV, Fire OS, Tizen ou encore tvOS devraient dès lors faire plus de place à la concurrence, mais rien n'est encore décidé....

item.title: Check out some of the best Apple Watch deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale - Save on Series 11 and SE 3 models
item.description: Check out the best early Apple Watch deals to shop ahead of Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale, including deals on Series 11 and SE 3 models.

item.title: Xbox lines up a Partner Preview showcase for March 26
item.description: Microsoft has locked in its second games showcase of the year. A Xbox Partner Preview stream will take place on March 26 at 1PM ET. It'll be available on the Xbox YouTube and Twitch channels. There'll be dedicated Twitch and YouTube streams with ASL interpretation, another featuring British Sign Language and one with audio descriptions in English on the main Xbox YouTube channel. The YouTube stream will be in 4K at 60fps (other channels are limited to 1080p) and have subtitle support for nearly three dozen languages. The broadcast will be available on regional Xbox channels as well. This showc...

item.title: John Boyega Has Had Talks About a Potential ‘Star Wars’ Return
item.description: Plus, Drew Goddard won't say whether or not Keanu Reeves will return for 'Matrix 5'.

item.title: LaGuardia Airport Closed Following Fatal Crash Between a Jet and Fire Truck
item.description: The pilot and copilot of an Air Canada flight have died after colliding with a fire truck during landing.

item.title: Watch out for suspicious Microsoft Azure Monitor alerts – it could be this shifty new callback phishing attack
item.description: No, Azure Monitor did not just notify you, even though the mail came from its domain.

item.title: This playful desk reimagines the cubicle for our new era of work
item.description: Vitra’s new design is a mobile, customizable space for the modern workplace. As return-to-office mandates tighten, many workers are reckoning what life in a cubicle looks like. If it’s up to the Swiss furniture and design firm Vitra, your next cubicle might not look much like a cubicle at all.

item.title: Endurance, détection de gestes, IA : blindée de fonctionnalités, la nouvelle montre connectée Xiaomi Watch 5 chute sous les 300 €
item.description: Capteur qui lui permet de réagir à des gestes spécifiques, autonomie généreuse, multitude de fonctions sport et santé... Pour sa montre connectée Watch 5, Xiaomi n'a pas fait les choses à moitié. La marque la propose en plus à 299,99 euros au lieu de 319,99 euros, en ce moment.

item.title: From “obvious” to delightful: building products for real people
item.description: How overconfidence, false consensus, and confirmation bias within teams lead to product decisions that fail to resonate.

item.title: I loved gazing at the ultra-thin design of HP’s 2-in-1 OmniBook — but its OLED display captivated me even more
item.description: The HP OmniBook Ultra Flip 14 promises to be the ultimate portable tool for creators — but is it really suitable for their needs?

item.title: The best Apple deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale — save on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: Shop all the best Apple deals ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and the M4 iPad Air.

item.title: Les nouveaux Apple TV et HomePod mini seraient fins prêts, mais c’est Siri qui coince
item.description: Il y a bien sûr les vedettes du catalogue comme l'iPhone, l'iPad ou les MacBook. Mais Apple compte aussi d'autres produits moins courus mais appréciés par une frange d'utilisateurs. Il en va ainsi des AirPods Max (qui ont eu droit à un rafraîchissement a minima la semaine dernière), des HomePod et de l'Apple TV… dont on a enfin quelques nouvelles.

item.title: Americans expecting bigger tax refunds from Trump this year will likely spend them on gas
item.description: Spiking gas prices are expected to eat up tax refunds in 2026. The U.S. economy was supposed to start the year with a bang, fueled by an unusually large jump in tax refunds from President Donald Trump’s tax cut legislation. Yet spiking gas prices are on track to eat up those refunds, leaving most Americans with little extra to spend.“Next spring is projected to be the largest tax refund season of all time,” Trump said in a prime-time speech in December that was intended to address voters’ concerns about the economy and stubbornly high prices.But that was before the Iran war, which began Feb. 2...

item.title: Une cyberattaque « discrète » vise Chrome : un virus a trouvé le moyen de voler la clé de vos données
item.description: Un nouveau virus a trouvé le moyen de contourner les protections de Chrome. Baptisé VoidStealer, le malware parvient à voler la clé maîtresse qui protège vos cookies et sessions, ouvrant potentiellement l’accès à l’ensemble de vos comptes en ligne. Diffusé sous forme d’abonnement « malware-as-a-service » sur le dark web, il inaugure une technique de piratage suffisamment discrète pour inquiéter les chercheurs....

item.title: SNL UK roasts Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor during first ever Weekend Update
item.description: "SNL UK" launched on Saturday with its first ever Weekend Update from anchors Ania Magliano and Paddy Young, featuring jokes about Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.

item.title: ‘Last of Us’ Spider Pretends to Be a Zombie Fungus—and It’s Bizarrely Brilliant
item.description: A tour guide uncovered the morbid new species by mistake in the Ecuadorian Amazon.

item.title: Confronting the CEO of the AI company that impersonated me
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Shishir Mehrotra, who is CEO of Superhuman — that’s the company formerly known as Grammarly, which is still its flagship product. Shishir also used to be the chief product officer at YouTube, and he’s on the board of directors at Spotify. He’s a fascinating guy, and we actually scheduled this interview […]

item.title: Android Auto has stopped working for many users — and the Samsung Galaxy S26 is among the phones affected
item.description: There are widespread reports of Pixel and Galaxy handsets no longer working properly with Android Auto.

item.title: ‘No discernible sacrifice’: The iPhone Air offers market-leading performance in one key way, new report says
item.description: The iPhone Air’s C1X modem is one of the fastest on the market, a new report claims.

item.title: Apple launched a ton of products this month — here's all the new additions, and how much they cost
item.description: Now the dust has settled on Apple's launch extravaganza, here's a run-down of what the new lineup looks like.

item.title: The best Apple AirTags deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — 4-pack hits new record low
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale officially kicks off on March 25. But you can already score early discounts on Apple AirTags to keep track of your luggage, keys, and wallet.

item.title: ‘For All Mankind’ Season 5 Beautifully Sets the Series Up for the Future
item.description: Joel Kinnaman and a new cast of characters lead the alternate reality space drama, which returns on March 27.
